notes: The default unit of research work is one taxonomy control.
Coverage status is planning state, not a public claim about evidence maturity.
Baseline coverage is stale when the latest dated publication, session, or claim check is at least 60 days old.

selection_policy.when_request_is_too_broad: Decompose to one control-level pass before creating records.
